channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Biden is giving the 2nd highest civilian award to the leaders of the Jan. 6 congressional committee
item.description: President Joe Biden is bestowing the second highest civilian medal on Liz Cheney and Bennie Thompson, leaders of the congressional investigation into the Capitol riot who Donald Trump has said should be jailed for their roles in the inquiry.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Duchess Meghan returns to Instagram
item.description: (The Hill) -- Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex, announced her return to Instagram on New Year’s Day with a celebratory post on the beach. The former actress Meghan Markle jogged across the sand in an all-white outfit with her hair flowing in the wind before writing 2025 in the sand.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Trump blames 'open borders' for New Orleans, Las Vegas attacks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump blamed the situation at the U.S.-southern border for the recent attacks in New Orleans and Las Vegas, railing against President Joe Biden for his immigration policies as both cases are being investigated.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WGN 9

item.title: New Orleans attack victims: What we know so far
item.description: Investigations continue into an "act of terrorism" in New Orleans' bustling Canal and Bourbon streets after a truck drove into a crowd, killing 15 people and injuring at least 35 more.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, KREX 5

item.title: 10 people are wounded in a shooting outside a New York City nightclub
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Ten people were wounded in a shooting outside a New York City nightclub while they were waiting to get into a private event, police said. About 15 people were standing outside Amazura nightclub at 11:15 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Sugar Bowl security to equal Super Bowl: New Orleans police
item.description: The New Orleans Police Department revealed Thursday that the annual Sugar Bowl will feature heightened security after a man drove directly into a crowd on Bourbon Street earlier this week, leaving 15 dead.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Meet the newest breed in American Kennel Club's lineup
item.description: Say hello to the latest dog in the American Kennel Club's lineup of recognized breeds. Or you might say “hej.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: An aspiring nurse, a football star, a single mother and a father of 2 killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — An 18-year-old girl dreaming of becoming a nurse, a single mother, a father of two and a former Princeton football star suffered fatal injuries when the driver of a white pickup truck sped down Bourbon Street, packed with holiday revelers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 10 people shot outside New York City nightclub on New Year's Day: NYPD
item.description: At least 10 people were shot outside a Queens nightclub on New Year's Day, according to the New York City Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, KRON4

item.title: A drop in groundwater could mean big trouble for a tiny snail as Nevada lithium project presses on
item.description: RENO, Nev. (AP) — Opponents of the nation's largest lithium mine under construction want U.S. officials to investigate whether the project in Nevada already has caused a drop in groundwater levels that could lead to extinction of a tiny snail being considered for endangered species protection.
item.dc:creator: SCOTT SONNER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Las Vegas police say Cybertruck that exploded at Trump hotel had fuel containers, large firework mortars
item.description: The Las Vegas Metropolitan Police Department and FBI are investigating the explosion of a Tesla Cybertruck in front of the Trump hotel in Vegas, that left 1 dead.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Latest: Death toll in New Orleans crash rises to 15, coroner says
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — A driver behind the wheel of a pickup truck rammed into a crowd of New Orleans revelers on Bourbon Street early on New Year’s Day, killing at least 15 people in what the FBI is investigating as an act of terrorism.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Protesters in Syria demand justice for disappeared activists and accountability from all factions
item.description: DOUMA, Syria (AP) — Protesters in Syria held a sit-in Wednesday demanding justice for four activists who were forcibly disappeared in 2013 and whose fate remains one of the most haunting mysteries of the country's 13-year civil war. On Dec.
item.dc:creator: OMAR ALBAM and SALLY ABOU ALJOUD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LeBron James' youngest son Bryce commits to Arizona
item.description: Bryce James, son of NBA star LeBron James, is heading to Arizona. Bryce James announced his decision Wednesday on Instagram and his father had a quick response.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New Orleans terror attack in photos
item.description: A driver wrought carnage on New Orleans' famed French Quarter early on New Year's Day, killing at least 10 people as he steered around a police blockade and rammed a pickup truck into a crowd before being shot to death by police, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Sugar Bowl postponed to Thursday night
item.description: Hours following the New Year's Day tragedy on Bourbon Street, Wednesday's Allstate Sugar Bowl bout between Notre Dame and Georgia is being postponed.
item.dc:creator: Richie Mills, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Why you should probably throw away your Christmas tree this week
item.description: With the holiday season now behind us, it might be time to consider losing your Christmas trees, too.
item.dc:creator: Tylor Sorensen, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says he'll attend Jimmy Carter's funeral
item.description: Asked by The Associated Press as he walked into a New Year's Eve party at his Mar-a-Lago club in Florida, Trump said "I'll be there.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KRON4

item.title: Houston driver ‘hellbent on carnage’ kills 10, injures 30 in New Orleans on New Year’s Day
item.description: A U.S. Army veteran driving a pickup truck that bore the flag of the Islamic State group has wrought carnage on New Orleans’ raucous New Year’s celebration.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: FDA testing aged raw cow's milk cheese for bird flu
item.description: Raw, unpasteurized milk is a known vector of bird flu when derived from infected cow herds. It can also contain pathogens such as E. coli, salmonella, and both Streptococcus and Staphylococcus bacteria.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, WGN 9

item.title: Mother of 5 children killed in New Year's Eve 2022 fire sues homeowners
item.description: The mother of five children killed in a fire at a home on Dartmouth Avenue in Buffalo on New Year's Eve in 2022 has filed a lawsuit against the owners of the home.
item.dc:creator: Aidan Joly, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Have any New Year's resolutions? Here are some tips to help make them stick
item.description: Studies have shown that up to 70% of people who make New Year’s resolutions abandon those good intentions within months. Here are some tips for how to keep those resolutions when your willpower starts to falter.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: How to catch the Quadrantids, the first meteor shower of 2025
item.description: When the Quadrantid meteor shower peaks on Friday, it will be the year's first chance to see fireballs in the sky.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA LARSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: FBI issues warning after home of NBA star Luka Doncic targeted in string of burglaries
item.description: The FBI is warning sports leagues about crime organizations targeting professional athletes following a string of burglaries at the homes of prominent NFL and NBA players.
item.dc:creator: Nancy Loo, Fox 5

item.title: FBI issues warning after home of NBA star Luka Doncic targeted in string of burglaries
item.description: The FBI is warning sports leagues about crime organizations targeting professional athletes following a string of burglaries at the homes of prominent NFL and NBA players.
item.dc:creator: Nancy Loo, WGN 9

item.title: Appeals court upholds verdict finding Trump liable for sexually assaulting E. Jean Carroll
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Monday upheld a jury’s verdict finding President-elect Donald Trump liable for sexually assaulting advice columnist E. Jean Carroll and ordering him to pay $5 million.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Move over, Gen Alpha: 2025 marks the start of the Gen Beta era
item.description: If you just found out about Generation Alpha, brace yourself for a new crop of kids set to debut on Jan. 1.
item.dc:creator: Sakshi Venkatraman, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Northern lights could be visible in upper fringes of the US on New Year's Eve
item.description: There's a chance solar storms may bring northern lights to several northern U.S states just in time for the new year.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
